title: Assist with garden soil health and plant nutrition
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assist with garden soil health and plant nutrition demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Undertake simple soil assessment tests

pcs.text: Collect and prepare soil samples for testing according to instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect and prepare soil samples for testing according to instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect and prepare soil samples for testing according to instructions.

pcs.text: Determine basic soil characteristics and health using field test techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine basic soil characteristics and health using field test techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine basic soil characteristics and health using field test techniques.

pcs.text: Observe and assess basic soil conditions from plant growth and health characteristics
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe and assess basic soil conditions from plant growth and health characteristics?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe and assess basic soil conditions from plant growth and health characteristics.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Undertake simple soil assessment tests

elements.title: Apply approved organic soil supplements to improve soil

pcs.text: Identify probable soil improvement needs from tests, and confirm with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify probable soil improvement needs from tests, and confirm with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify probable soil improvement needs from tests, and confirm with supervisor.

pcs.text: Apply soil supplements to improve soil condition according to supervisor instructions and permaculture principles
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply soil supplements to improve soil condition according to supervisor instructions and permaculture principles?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply soil supplements to improve soil condition according to supervisor instructions and permaculture principles.

pcs.text: Use permaculture planting techniques to improve soils and plant nutrition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use permaculture planting techniques to improve soils and plant nutrition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use permaculture planting techniques to improve soils and plant nutrition.

pcs.text: Apply mulch to maintain moisture and discourage unwanted growth according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply mulch to maintain moisture and discourage unwanted growth according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply mulch to maintain moisture and discourage unwanted growth according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Apply approved organic soil supplements to improve soil

elements.title: Monitor soil health

pcs.text: Monitor soil health and moisture according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor soil health and moisture according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor soil health and moisture according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Monitor use of reclaimed water for signs of toxicity according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor use of reclaimed water for signs of toxicity according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor use of reclaimed water for signs of toxicity according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Conduct observations for signs of problems in plant health
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct observations for signs of problems in plant health?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct observations for signs of problems in plant health.

pcs.text: Conduct basic tests for soil health where signs are found
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct basic tests for soil health where signs are found?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct basic tests for soil health where signs are found.

pcs.text: Report observations and basic test results to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report observations and basic test results to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report observations and basic test results to supervisor.

pcs.text: Record soil improvement activity according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record soil improvement activity according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record soil improvement activity according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Monitor soil health

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
